examples: He demanded an apology from the slanderer.
A slanderer cannot succeed unless he has a reputation for hating slander.
Armed with facts and figures he had little difficulty in talking the slanderer down.
Using middle school investigative tactics, I figured out I had snubbed the slanderer at lunch the day before, and the note had been her revenge.
Sarkozy labeled Hollande a liar and a "little slanderer, " while Hollande accused the president of shirking his responsibilities, cronyism and favoring the privileged over France's poor.
